'''Yetoros''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Utos system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CatCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
